MINI MINUTES: Andrew M. Purdy, Esq., appearing for Defendant Country Wide and BOA. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered heard this day. No appearance for Plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/30/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Limiting Scope Of Examination At Deposition And Scope Of Production Of Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC.'s Motion For Protective Order Limiting Scope Of Examination At Deposition And Scope Of Production Of Documents At Deposition is granted in part and denied in part.

The motion is denied as to Category Numbers 1-8, 14, 15, 19, 20, 21, and 23.

The motion is granted as to Category Numbers 9-10, and 13, as the categories are limited to communications regarding the loan.

The motion is granted as to Category Numbers 11 and 12 as they are overly broad.

The motion is granted as to Category Numbers 16, 17, 18, and 23, limited to San Francisco Bay region offices.

As to all categories, the court will not attempt to speculate what specific testimony is sought. Any question will be subject to appropriate objections. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
